archetype: Archetype 3: Pastel & Soft (with E1 Neo-Brutalist Twist)
vibe: Smart, tactile, organized, and bold. A productivity tool that feels like a modern sketchbook rather than a sterile enterprise app.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Control Room Grid for dashboard, Generous Spacing for content.
spacing_and_layout.containers: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-lg shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] p-6 md:p-8
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align dense content and forms. Asymmetrical bento grids for dashboard widgets.

components_strategy.buttons: bg-[#FFD873] text-black border-2 border-black rounded-md shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-all font-bold px-6 py-3
components_strategy.inputs: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-md p-3 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-shadow
components_strategy.cards: bg-white border-2 border-black rounded-xl shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] hover:shadow-[8px_8px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] transition-shadow overflow-hidden
components_strategy.file_upload_zone: border-4 border-dashed border-black rounded-2xl p-12 text-center bg-[#F4F4F0] hover:bg-[#A3E6D0] transition-colors cursor-pointer group
components_strategy.mind_map: Use React Flow (reactflow) or similar library. Nodes should be flat pastel colors (mint, yellow, lavender) with 2px solid black borders and straight/stepped black edges. No drop shadows on nodes, just hard offset shadows.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Hard translations (x and y shifts) rather than fades. Compressing shadows to simulate physical buttons.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Fast, hard-edged marquee progress bars or spinning geometric shapes.

images.description: Minimalist geometric shapes connected by thin lines, pale mint and butter yellow, neo-brutalist empty state illustration. Use this in the Mind Map section before a map is generated.
Floating paper sheets with a subtle glow. Use this as a decorative element near the file upload dropzone.
Student learning on laptop. Use this as a placeholder for the user profile avatar in the dashboard header.

icons.style: Stroke width 2.5 or 3 for a chunkier, brutalist feel matching the bold fonts.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text against pastel backgrounds meets minimum 4.5:1 ratio. The Deep Obsidian (#0A0A0A) text on Mint/Yellow/Lavender easily passes.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements, forms, and key informational nodes MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-notes-button', data-testid='mind-map-canvas').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using a Neo-Brutalist aesthetic. Do not use soft, blurred drop shadows (e.g., shadow-md). Use hard offset shadows: shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]
Use Cabinet Grotesk for all headings. Use Outfit for body text.
Implement the layout using a bento-box grid style. The sidebar navigation should have a solid right border (border-r-2 border-black).
The file upload zone should be massive, centered, with a dashed border, changing background color on hover/drag-over.
For the mind map visualization, use a library like 'reactflow'. Style the nodes to match the neo-brutalist cards (pastel background, 2px solid black border).
In the Combined Notes display area, use standard typography but wrap the content area in a hard-bordered container. Use monospace fonts for tags or metadata.
Do not use generic Shadcn designs out-of-the-box. Strip the soft borders and add border-2 border-black and hard shadows to standard components like Dialog, Input, and Button.
Ensure the fonts (Cabinet Grotesk, Outfit, JetBrains Mono) are properly imported in the global CSS or index.html.
